summary: Squidpy is the scverse toolkit for scalable analysis and visualization of spatial molecular data.
Squidpy builds on scanpy and anndata, providing streamlined APIs for feature extraction, spatial statistics, and interactive exploration of tissue sections together with microscopy images.
Squidpy provides tools to build and analyze the neighborhood graph from spatial coordinates.
Squidpy enables computation of spatial statistics for cell-types and genes.

Squidpy provides plotting functions including pl.spatial_scatter, pl.spatial_segment, pl.nhood_enrichment, pl.centrality_scores, pl.interaction_matrix, pl.ligrec, pl.ripley, pl.co_occurrence, pl.extract, and pl.var_by_distance.
Squidpy provides reading functions for visium, vizgen, and nanostring file formats.
Squidpy provides dataset functions for accessing example datasets including four_i, imc, seqfish, merfish, mibitof, slideseqv2, sc_mouse_cortex, and various visium datasets.
